messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "02812401-75ee-42be-9f75-42d7e29eed67", "article_id": "bb6f5e82-58bf-4bab-bc1f-dea986d8e69f", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "creative_director_appointment", "brand": "Lanvin", "person": "Peter Copping", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Lanvin 任命 Peter Copping为品牌艺术总监", "非常荣幸可以成为Lanvin的艺术总监"], "anchor_json": {"role_type": "artistic_director", "predecessor_context": "品牌过去两年转型期", "brand": "Lanvin", "person": "Peter Copping"}}, {"event_frame_id": "70b908ba-e1a4-4f93-b433-0437ad4ea4e8", "article_id": "bb6f5e82-58bf-4bab-bc1f-dea986d8e69f", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "creative_director_career_history", "brand": "", "person": "Peter Copping", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["从业伊始，他任职于Sonia Rykiel", "在Marc Jacobs执掌Louis Vuitton期间负责女装设计"], "anchor_json": {"career_trajectory": "luxury_fashion_houses", "geographic_scope": "Paris_New_York", "person": "Peter Copping"}}, {"event_frame_id": "7e137eac-4614-439e-b361-76bbf0ec4a35", "article_id": "bb6f5e82-58bf-4bab-bc1f-dea986d8e69f", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "creative_director_previous_role", "brand": "", "person": "Peter Copping", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Peter Copping 最近就职于Balenciaga主管高级定制系列，由他领导工坊进行高级定制系列的重启"], "anchor_json": {"role_status": "most_recent_position_prior_to_appointment", "specific_focus": "haute_couture", "person": "Peter Copping"}}]}
